data.body: Landed (commit d2a8a5c6). Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 10 advisory — param shapes/reference-runner/journaling all made concrete; the editability + criteria-library-mirrors-prompt-library refinement applied). Built the FULL v3 path per the immutable-schema discipline: workflow.v3.schema.json (= v2 + batch; v2 untouched), the v2->v3 pure-bump shim, schema.py wiring. The batch step uses the editable, prompt-library-backed criteria shape {prompt, when?, with?}; the BatchRunner seam + reference DefaultBatchRunner (split-on-context-limit real; cost/shed honestly stubbed -> epic B); the interpreter resolves each when (reusing if: machinery), delegates, and stores the OPAQUE batch_plan wholesale — a garbage-plan test proves it never branches on internals. Code-review subagent (general-purpose): clean — verified v2 untouched, the oneOf rejects mixes, the interpreter never inspects the plan, the split is bounded (depth<8, 1-criterion can't split), stubs honest; fixed the one minor finding (added batch to the type enum). Burr-tripwire green; full suite 3246 passed/13 skipped (run ALONE, HEAD stable); make lint clean.
